Product Categories

🌟 Our Story

Nexdrop Mart is Bihar's emerging B2B & Retail marketplace for two of India's most beloved products — Premium Mithila Makhana and Fine Quality Tea. Founded in 2024 under Nexdrop Solutions Pvt Ltd, we bridge the gap between Bihar's best farms and customers across India.

Like Amazon brings everything to your doorstep, Nexdrop Mart brings the best of Bihar — directly, honestly, and affordably. Whether you are a home buyer looking for healthy snacks, or a business owner seeking bulk supply, we have a solution for you.

🛒 Our 4 Product Categories

🛒
Retail Tea
Small packs for home use
📦
Wholesale Tea
Bulk supply for businesses
🛒
Retail Makhana
Premium packs for home
📦
Wholesale Makhana
Bulk orders for resellers

🎯 Our Mission

To make premium Mithila Makhana and quality Tea accessible and affordable to every Indian household, while building a powerful B2B supply network that empowers wholesalers, retailers, and distributors across India.

👁️ Our Vision

To become India's #1 Makhana & Tea B2B Marketplace — a trusted platform connecting Bihar's finest farms with buyers and sellers across the nation, empowering businesses of every size with quality products and seamless supply.

🏭 What We Offer

  • 🌾 Retail Makhana — 7 Suta, 6 Suta, 5 Suta, Mix Grade packs for home buyers
  • 📦 Wholesale Makhana — Bulk supply (min 10 KG) for distributors & retailers
  • ☕ Retail Tea — Darjeeling, Assam CTC, Green, Herbal packs for home use
  • 🏭 Wholesale Tea — Bulk tea supply for hotels, cafes, offices & resellers
  • 🏷️ White-Label / Custom Branding — Launch your own brand with our products
  • 🤝 Dealership & Distributor Program — Become a Nexdrop partner

💪 Why We Are Different

✔ Direct from Mithila Bihar farms — no middlemen
✔ 4 Categories: Retail & Wholesale for Tea & Makhana
✔ Competitive B2B pricing with GST invoices
✔ Pan India delivery — COD available
✔ Custom branding & white-label options
✔ Backed by Nexdrop Solutions Pvt Ltd

🤝 For Business Partners

Whether you are a kirana store owner, supermarket buyer, hotel purchase manager, or online reseller — Nexdrop Mart is your one-stop wholesale source. We offer competitive MOQ pricing, GST invoices, and dedicated support for bulk buyers.

📞 Call or WhatsApp us at +91 9006606697 to discuss bulk pricing.

Our Promise 🤝

"Quality in every pack, trust in every relationship — from Bihar's farms to your business."
